source_title: India import transaction for AR-coated tempered patterned solar glass
page_or_table: 21 May 2025 shipment: 606 metric tonnes valued at USD 374925; calculated unit value 618.69 USD/t
notes: Recent India import-unit-value proxy for new solar-grade glass. A separate end-of-life quality discount must be applied. Replace with an official 2026 annual benchmark if available.

source_title: Thermal-Mechanical Delamination for Recovery of Tempered Glass from Photovoltaic Panels; Solvent versus thermal treatment for glass recovery from end of life photovoltaic panels: Environmental and economic assessment
page_or_table: Studies report contamination and low-value glass fractions from conventional treatment, while improved delamination can recover high-grade glass; neither source specifies an exact 30 percent discount
notes: The 30 percent central discount is retained as an allowance for contamination, breakage, encapsulant residues, sorting requirements and possible downcycling. The actual value depends on the recovery process and output purity. This is a price-quality adjustment, not a material recovery loss.

page_or_table: Official cash bid and ask prices, 20 July 2026
notes: Midpoint of the LME official cash bid and ask; primary-metal benchmark before applying the end-of-life quality discount.

source_title: Economics and Environmental Impacts of Photovoltaic Panel Recycling in Germany
page_or_table: Table 7: secondary aluminium valued using a 20 percent discount relative to primary aluminium
notes: Central quality-price discount for recovered aluminium. This affects unit price only and does not represent material recovery loss.

page_or_table: Silicon data sheet: 2025 average metallurgical-grade silicon-metal price of 130 US cents/lb; converted to 2866.01 USD/t
notes: Official 2025 annual U.S. silicon-metal benchmark used as a proxy for recoverable PV silicon. It is not a solar-grade polysilicon or recovered-wafer selling price. Apply a separate end-of-life quality discount.

source_title: Economics and Environmental Impacts of Photovoltaic Panel Recycling in Germany; Recovery of Valuable Materials from the Waste Crystalline-Silicon Photovoltaic Cell and Ribbon
source_organization: Bhandari and Ameer; Chen et al.
page_or_table: The 2026 study assumes no depreciation for recovered solar-grade silicon; the 2021 study reports recovered silicon purity of 99.84 percent
notes: The exact 25 percent discount is not prescribed by either source. It is retained as a conservative allowance for purification requirements, variable purity and uncertain marketability when the recovery pathway is not specified. This is a price-quality adjustment and not a material recovery loss.

page_or_table: Official cash bid and ask prices, 20 July 2026
notes: Midpoint of the LME official cash bid and ask; primary-metal benchmark before applying the end-of-life quality discount.

page_or_table: Europe No. 2 Birch/Cliff copper scrap assessed at 91-93 percent of LME cash copper prices on 10 June 2025; midpoint of 92 percent implies an 8 percent discount
notes: Central price discount based on the midpoint discount for No. 2 copper scrap relative to LME cash copper. The actual discount for PV ribbon copper depends on separation quality, solder residues and recovered-metal purity. This is a price-quality adjustment, not a material recovery loss.

source_title: COMEX Silver Futures - July 2026 historical data
page_or_table: 20 July 2026 closing price: 56.802 USD/troy ounce; converted using 32150.7466 troy ounces per metric tonne
notes: COMEX July 2026 futures closing price used as a refined-silver benchmark. It is not the selling price of silver recovered from end-of-life PV modules; apply a separate quality discount.

source_title: Economics and Environmental Impacts of Photovoltaic Panel Recycling in Germany
page_or_table: Table 7 reports recovered silver purity of 99.57 percent and states that depreciation is already accounted for in the recovered-material price; the exact 5 percent discount is not specified
notes: The 5 percent central discount is retained as a conservative allowance for purity variation, assay, refining and marketability differences relative to the refined-silver benchmark. The cited study supports high-purity silver recovery but does not directly prescribe a 5 percent discount. This is a price adjustment and not a material recovery loss.

source_title: Weighted import unit value of solar-grade EVA resin E280PV and E282PV shipments to India
page_or_table: Four E280PV/E282PV shipments during February-April 2025: total value USD 1634421.05 divided by 1291 metric tonnes equals 1266.01 USD/t
notes: Solar-grade EVA resin benchmark used as a proxy for the aggregated PV polymer stream. The model category may also include PET and fluoropolymer backsheet materials. Apply a separate end-of-life quality discount and replace with an official composition-weighted benchmark when available.

source_title: The Design Value for Recycling End-of-Life Photovoltaic Panels; Recovery and analysis of polymeric layers from waste solar modules by chemical route
page_or_table: PV encapsulants and backsheets are described as difficult to recycle and of low commercial value; solvent-based recovery produced EVA and backsheet properties comparable to reference polymers, but neither study specifies an exact 40 percent discount
notes: The 40 percent central discount is retained to represent mixed-polymer composition, ageing, contamination, separation difficulty and uncertain resale applications. The actual discount depends strongly on recovery technology and polymer purity. This is a price-quality adjustment and not a material recovery loss.
